title: As It Was
lyrics:
[Intro]
Come on, Harry, we wanna say goodnight to you
  > [#1, 372 votes] Styles introduces us to his lead single with a voicemail from his goddaughter Ruby, whose father is British television producer Ben Winston, a close friend of the artist who also directed quite a few...

[Verse 1]
Holdin' me back
Gravity's holdin' me back
I want you to hold out the palm of your hand
Why don't we leave it at that?
Nothin' to say
  > [#2, 113 votes] This specific lyric reminisces of another line from “Two Ghosts,” a 2017 track that belongs to Harry’s debut album Telling those stories we already told Styles' 2019 single “Falling,” also shows...
When everything gets in the way
Seems you cannot be replaced
And I'm the one who will stay, oh-oh-oh

[Chorus]
In this world, it's just us
You know it's not the same as it was
You know it's not the same as it was
  > [#3, 198 votes] In a May 2022 interview for Apple Music, Styles explained his perspective on this line: For me, everything that happened in the pandemic, like, it’s never gonna be the same as before. All of the...
In this world, it's just us
As it was, as it was
You know it's not the same

[Verse 2]
Answer the phone
"Harry, you're no good alone
  > [#4, 173 votes] This manner of bearing with the distance of an ex partner resembles of the attitude Styles took previously on his 2017 track, “Meet Me in the Hallway:” Just let me know, I’ll be at the door, at the...
Why are you sitting at home on the floor?
What kind of pills are you on?"
Ringin' the bell
  > [#5, 19 votes] In most inpatient care facilities worldwide, patients have some form of ‘bell’ or ‘button’ they can ‘ring’ or activate to notify medical providers that they need assistance of some kind. Harry seems...
And nobody's coming to help
Your daddy lives by himself
  > [#6, 108 votes] This lyric is probably the literal truth. When Styles was seven years old, his parents divorced. While his mother got remarried twice after the divorce, Styles' father has stayed single since, making...
He just wants to know that you're well, oh-oh-oh

[Chorus]
In this world, it's just us
You know it's not the same as it was
You know it's not the same as it was
  > [#3, see above]
In this world, it's just us
As it was, as it was
You know it's not the same

[Bridge]
Go home, get ahead, light-speed internet
I don't wanna talk about the way that it was
  > [#7, 131 votes] The motif of not wanting to talk about certain topics has already been expressed throughout Styles' discography. It made its first appearance on his breakout debut single, “Sign of the Times:” We...
Leave America, two kids follow her
I don't wanna talk about who's doin' it first

[Outro]
(Hey)
As it was
You know it's not the same as it was
  > [#3, see above]
As it was, as it was
